name: LANDMARK BANCORP INC
summary: Landmark Bancorp, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated financial holding company headquartered in Manhattan, Kansas, owning Landmark National Bank and Landmark Risk Management, Inc. The Bank offers one-to-four family residential real estate loans, commercial loans, CRE loans, agricultural loans, construction and land loans, and deposit services including checking, savings, and money market accounts. It operates 29 branch offices across 23 Kansas communities and one loan production office in Kansas City, Missouri, with approximately $1.6 billion in total assets as of December 31, 2024.
